instructions.instruction: Add cdk-nag rule packs to the CDK app using Aspects.of(app).add(new AwsSolutionsChecks({ verbose: true }))
instructions.original_snippets: Apply the AWS Solutions rule pack to every stack in the app: Aspects.of(app).add(new AwsSolutionsChecks({ verbose: true }));
instructions.relevant_when: adding cdk-nag to a CDK application for the first time

instructions.instruction: Run npx cdk synth to surface all nag findings before addressing them
instructions.original_snippets: Run synth to surface findings: npx cdk synth. Expected result: nag findings shown during synthesis.
instructions.relevant_when: after installing cdk-nag and adding rule packs

instructions.instruction: Prefer fixing insecure resources over suppressing findings — only add suppressions when fixing is not feasible
instructions.original_snippets: Prefer fixing insecure resources over suppressing findings.

instructions.instruction: Categorize each remaining finding as fix / suppress / defer before proceeding — do not advance until every finding has an owner and decision
instructions.original_snippets: Checkpoint: If findings remain after step 3, categorize each as fix / suppress / defer before proceeding. Do not advance until every finding has an owner and decision.
instructions.relevant_when: after initial triage of nag findings

instructions.instruction: Use NagSuppressions.addResourceSuppressions scoped to the exact resource and rule — never suppress an entire rule across the whole stack
instructions.original_snippets: Suppress a single rule on a specific construct, not the whole stack: NagSuppressions.addResourceSuppressions(myBucket, [...])

instructions.instruction: Suppression rationale must be concrete and reviewable — never use vague reasons like 'false positive' without evidence
instructions.original_snippets: BAD: reason: 'false positive' with no evidence. GOOD: reason: 'resource isolated in private subnet; compensating controls documented'.
instructions.relevant_when: writing the reason field in any suppression

instructions.instruction: Re-run npx cdk synth and CI checks after all suppressions are written, before merge
instructions.original_snippets: Re-run synth and CI checks before merge.
instructions.relevant_when: after writing suppressions, before merging the PR

instructions.instruction: Run target rule packs continuously in feature branches — do not enable production rule packs only at release time
instructions.original_snippets: GOOD: Run target rule packs continuously in feature branches. BAD: Add strict rule packs only before deployment.
instructions.relevant_when: setting up CI/CD pipeline for a CDK project
